scene_input.scene_summary: The Prophet explains that kindness can bring people together.
scene_input.key_visual_action: The Prophet gestures with his hands

schema_output.scene_title: The Prophet's Words Unite Bilal and the Community
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 265

characters.name: the central figure
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

characters.name: young man
characters.appearance: slender build, wearing a simple white thobe and a plain brown head covering

schema_output.narrative_text: The Prophet Muhammad explained to Bilal that kindness and compassion can bring people together and make them stronger.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. The interior of a simple 7th century mosque with unpainted mud-brick walls in warm earth tones, a packed-earth floor, and a few wooden pillars supporting the roof. Late afternoon golden sunlight streams through the open windows on the left, casting warm rays across the room. In the center, the man in the green cloak seen entirely from behind, stands facing a young man who is looking up at him with a mixture of curiosity and hope. The man in the green cloak has one hand extended in a gentle reassuring gesture, and the other hand is gesturing with a sweeping motion, as if explaining a point. The young man is dressed in a simple white thobe with a plain brown head covering, and his face is turned upwards, looking at the man in the green cloak with interest. Soft warm golden light, intimate and inspiring mood. Medium shot at eye level. Warm sand, cream, and golden palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
_safety_changes: 'the central figure' -> 'the man in the green cloak'
